change_notes: Extracted 'Lama' from given_names to name_prefix; 'Anagarika' remains as given name
Swapped family_name and given_names: 'Stuart' is the family name and 'Gilbert' is the given name, consistent with the unified_id 'gilbert_stuart'
Brüder Grimm is a collective/duo name, not an individual person; moved full name to single_name, set is_organisation true, cleared family_name and given_names
Moved 'Prince' from name_particles to name_prefix as it is an honorific title, not a connective particle
Name represents two individuals (Jules et Edmond de Goncourt); moved full name to single_name as it cannot be split into a single family/given name pair
Moved 'Frau Rat' from name_particles to name_prefix, as it is an honorific title, not a connective particle
Moved 'de' from family_name to name_particles; corrected family_name capitalization to 'Gomes de Brito'
Moved 'jun.' from name_particles to name_suffix as it is a generational suffix, not a connective particle
Moved 'Ritter von' from name_particles to name_suffix as it is an honorific title/designation, not a connective particle
Moved 'Graf' from name_particles to name_prefix as it is a title/honorific, not a connective particle
Removed particle 'Von' from family_name leaving 'Granier de Cassagnac'; corrected particle to lowercase 'de' in name_particles. Note: the correct French particle is 'de', not 'von'.
Corrected name_particle from 'von' to 'van'; Johanna van Gogh-Bonger is Dutch, not German
Extracted 'van' from family_name to name_particles; corrected family_name to 'Fuhrmann-Plemp van Duiveland' with lowercase particle
Normalized family_name capitalization from 'Góngora Y Argote' to 'Góngora y Argote' (the 'y' conjunction in Spanish compound surnames is lowercase)
Split single_name: extracted 'Graf' to name_prefix, 'de la' to name_particles, 'Garde' to family_name
